item.title: A Month of Farming on the Field
item.description: A look back at a full month of farm work. Covering planting, maintenance, and harvest tasks, showing the pace and challenges of daily agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: A Month of Farming on the Field
media:content.media:description: A look back at a full month of farm work. Covering planting, maintenance, and harvest tasks, showing the pace and challenges of daily agricultural operations.

item.title: Delivering Grain from the Farm
item.description: A look at hauling and dropping off grain after harvest. Covering transport, unloading, and the workflow involved in moving crops from field to storage or market.

media:content.media:title: Delivering Grain from the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at hauling and dropping off grain after harvest. Covering transport, unloading, and the workflow involved in moving crops from field to storage or market.

item.title: Checking a Failing Tractor Radiator
item.description: A farm equipment inspection focused on a failing radiator. Diagnosing cooling issues, checking components, and understanding how it affects field operations.

media:content.media:title: Checking a Failing Tractor Radiator
media:content.media:description: A farm equipment inspection focused on a failing radiator. Diagnosing cooling issues, checking components, and understanding how it affects field operations.

item.title: Brody’s Christmas Present Arrives
item.description: A Christmas surprise arrives for Brody. A simple look at the moment of receiving and unboxing a long-awaited gift during the holiday season.

media:content.media:title: Brody’s Christmas Present Arrives
media:content.media:description: A Christmas surprise arrives for Brody. A simple look at the moment of receiving and unboxing a long-awaited gift during the holiday season.

item.title: Close Call at the Farm Shed
item.description: A tense moment at the farm shed during routine work. A close call highlights equipment movement, quick reactions, and the importance of safety on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Close Call at the Farm Shed
media:content.media:description: A tense moment at the farm shed during routine work. A close call highlights equipment movement, quick reactions, and the importance of safety on the farm.

item.title: New Tires Installed on Farm Equipment
item.description: A look at upgrading farm equipment with new tires. Covering installation, fitment, and how fresh rubber improves traction and reliability during field work.

media:content.media:title: New Tires Installed on Farm Equipment
media:content.media:description: A look at upgrading farm equipment with new tires. Covering installation, fitment, and how fresh rubber improves traction and reliability during field work.

item.title: Test Drives Lead to Big Farm Upgrades
item.description: A series of equipment test drives leads to new decisions on the farm. Exploring performance, comfort, and how trials influence future machinery choices.

media:content.media:title: Test Drives Lead to Big Farm Upgrades
media:content.media:description: A series of equipment test drives leads to new decisions on the farm. Exploring performance, comfort, and how trials influence future machinery choices.

item.title: Grain Tank Auger Repair on the Farm
item.description: A closer look at repairing a grain tank auger during harvest. Step-by-step troubleshooting, fixing mechanical issues, and restoring smooth grain handling operations.

media:content.media:title: Grain Tank Auger Repair on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A closer look at repairing a grain tank auger during harvest. Step-by-step troubleshooting, fixing mechanical issues, and restoring smooth grain handling operations.

item.title: Getting Equipment Stuck on the Farm
item.description: A look at multiple farm situations where equipment gets stuck during field work. Recovery efforts, ground conditions, and lessons from tough operating conditions.

media:content.media:title: Getting Equipment Stuck on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at multiple farm situations where equipment gets stuck during field work. Recovery efforts, ground conditions, and lessons from tough operating conditions.

item.title: Emergency Shutdown on the Farm
item.description: A sudden equipment issue leads to an immediate shutdown during farm work. A quick look at troubleshooting, safety response, and protecting machinery from damage.

media:content.media:title: Emergency Shutdown on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A sudden equipment issue leads to an immediate shutdown during farm work. A quick look at troubleshooting, safety response, and protecting machinery from damage.
